user.title: Create RTS smart cover
user.description: Create a virtual position cover from an RTS/RFXtrx cover that only supports open, stop and close.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure RTS smart cover
reconfigure.description: Update the source cover, smart cover name, travel time or initial assumed position.

abort.already_configured: This source cover is already configured.
abort.reconfigure_successful: RTS Smart Covers was reconfigured successfully.
